name: Taffy Apple Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 package 20 oz refrigerated sugar cookie dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
2. Remove half of the cookie dough and reserve for another use.
3. Add flour to the remaining dough and knead with hands to combine.
4. Press dough into a 14-inch circle on a 15-inch baking stone.
5. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the cookie is lightly browned. Let cool for 10 minutes, then loosen from the stone. Cool completely.
6. Blend cream cheese, peanut butter, brown sugar, and vanilla together until smooth.
7. Spread the mixture on the cooled cookie.
8. Peel, core, and slice apples. Dip apple slices in lemon-lime soda to prevent browning.
9. Arrange apple slices on the cream cheese mixture.
10. Sprinkle lightly with cinnamon.
11. Heat caramel topping slightly and drizzle over apples.
12. Sprinkle chopped nuts over the pizza.
13. Cut and serve.
Recipe from Pampered Chef
Personal note: Excellent! Just like taffy apples.
